records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when ERA publishes a new season schedule or changes the venue network.
limitations: The reviewed evidence confirms meeting dates and venue scope, not reusable race times.
Detailed programme data remains on official sources.
records.notes: Conservative C-level Calendar decision derived from the reviewed country profile and official ERA season schedule.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate if KRA changes the meet-code, date, or programme routes.
limitations: Historical detail requests may return a shell response.
Public output remains capped at race label or number plus post time.
records.notes: Bounded prototype can target the reviewed KRA routes for Seoul, Busan-Gyeongnam, and Jeju without claiming an active scheduler.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when TJK changes annual-program or daily-program routes.
limitations: Race names are not consistently present across all tested meetings.
Public output remains capped at A.
records.notes: Bounded prototype can use the reviewed annual and daily TJK routes while preserving city and date parameters.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reopen when a stable public meeting source and date-to-racecourse pairing are verified.
records.blocked_reason: Stable public timetable acquisition and even C-level recurring meeting coverage are not confirmed.
limitations: No stable public meeting source was confirmed.
No official meeting-date and racecourse pairing was confirmed.
Nationwide verification remains unresolved.
records.notes: The C values are schema-floor placeholders only; blocked readiness and all-false confirmed fields prevent publication.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Teletrak mapping or any reviewed venue programme route changes.
limitations: The four reviewed venues are not claimed as a complete national inventory.
Simulcasting must remain excluded.
Programme formats remain venue-specific.
records.notes: A bounded prototype may use Teletrak discovery plus reviewed venue programmes while preserving venue-specific authority context.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate if the upcoming-programmes route changes or additional official venues are confirmed.
limitations: Only Monterrico was tested.
National completeness and operator identity remain unresolved.
Raw API payloads are not public outputs.
records.notes: A bounded Monterrico prototype can begin from the reviewed programme and race-detail API routes.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reopen when the official candidate becomes reachable and a public programme or timetable source is verified.
records.blocked_reason: Official-site reachability failed and no timetable source was confirmed.
limitations: All reviewed official URL candidates were unreachable.
No positive meeting or race sample was obtained.
The result must not be treated as rank C coverage.
records.notes: The C values are schema-floor placeholders only; the source remains blocked and no Calendar row may be generated.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Gávea programme route or document format changes.
limitations: The decision is venue-specific and does not establish national completeness.
Programme summary fields beyond times were not normalized in this backfill.
records.notes: A bounded manual-import prototype may begin for reviewed Gávea programmes.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Cidade Jardim programme route changes or Arabian timing becomes complete.
limitations: Timed Thoroughbred evidence and the untimed Arabian supplementary race must remain separate.
The decision is venue-specific.
records.notes: A bounded manual-import prototype may begin for the timed Cidade Jardim programme scope.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Cristal programme route or document format changes.
limitations: The decision is venue-specific and does not establish national completeness.
records.notes: A bounded manual-import prototype may begin for reviewed Cristal programmes.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reopen after the programme can be paired with a verified exact meeting date.
records.blocked_reason: An exact meeting-date pairing is required before current Calendar ingestion.
limitations: The exact meeting date was unresolved in the reviewed sample.
The Quarter Horse system must remain separate from Thoroughbred and Arabian racing.
records.notes: Race-time capability is reviewed, but Calendar operation is blocked until the meeting date is verified.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the racecard route changes or a reliable venue identity is confirmed.
limitations: Reliable venue identity was not confirmed.
Race names, surface, and course labels were not reliably confirmed.
Prohibited racecard fields must be ignored.
records.notes: A bounded source prototype can begin, but candidate promotion must require a verified venue.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at publication or opening of the 2026-27 season and when venue labels become reliable.
limitations: The reviewed source window ended in April 2026.
Venue identity was not consistent enough for a principal-racecourse claim.
Surface and course labels were not confirmed.
records.notes: A bounded seasonal prototype can begin after next-season revalidation, with promotion blocked when venue identity is absent.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reopen when a stable advance fixture and scheduled post-time source appears for the 2026-27 season.
records.blocked_reason: No stable advance meeting and post-time source was confirmed.
limitations: Reviewed evidence is primarily retrospective or same-day.
No stable country-wide advance timetable was confirmed.
Recorded or live-start times must not be converted into scheduled post times.
records.notes: The evidence confirms activity at Al Rahba but does not support recurring current Calendar operation.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a new official card appears, a stable future calendar is published, or reliable scheduled post times become available.
limitations: The reviewed card did not contain reliable scheduled post times.
Extracted clock values from historical form data must be rejected.
The decision covers Borrowdale Park only.
records.notes: Manual import can maintain C-level meeting date and venue confirmation from reviewed official cards.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at JRA programme rollover or when programme routes change.
limitations: Public output remains capped at A.
JRA capability must not be generalized to NAR or Banei.
No active production scheduler is claimed.
records.notes: A bounded JRA prototype can begin from the reviewed programme route.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reassess after authority-specific NAR timetable coverage is reviewed consistently.
limitations: Complete NAR timetable coverage remains pending.
Authority-specific differences must not be flattened into a JRA-like national feed.
records.notes: The completed treatment for this backfill is a reviewed official link and explanatory C-level scope, not an automation claim.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reassess when Banei schedule and per-race timetable coverage are reviewed under its own terminology.
limitations: Complete Banei timetable coverage remains pending.
Flat-racing surface and course assumptions must not be imposed on Banei.
records.notes: The completed treatment for this backfill is a reviewed Banei official link and explanatory C-level scope.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at HKJC season rollover or when fixture and programme routes change.
limitations: Public output remains capped at A.
Complete racecard reproduction and prohibited participant or betting fields are excluded.
Additional programme fields require separate publication-policy review.
records.notes: A bounded HKJC prototype can begin from the reviewed fixture and programme path without claiming scheduled production operation.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when NZTR or LOVERACING race-information routes change.
limitations: The reviewed A+ result applies to Thoroughbred samples only.
Harness capability must remain separate.
National venue completeness remains partial.
records.notes: A bounded Thoroughbred prototype can begin from the reviewed meeting-page path.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when HRNZ calendar routes change or complete per-race timetable coverage is confirmed.
limitations: Only harness racing dates were confirmed in the reviewed batch.
Per-race post-time completeness was not established.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can maintain C-level harness meeting dates and venue context from the official HRNZ calendar.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when 4Racing programme routes or operator venue scope changes.
limitations: The record is operator-specific and not a complete national feed.
Surface fields were not normalized in the backfill.
records.notes: A bounded 4Racing prototype can begin from reviewed operator pages.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Gold Circle programme routes or operator venue scope changes.
limitations: The record is operator-specific and remains separate from 4Racing.
Surface fields were not normalized in the backfill.
records.notes: A bounded Gold Circle prototype can begin from reviewed operator pages.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the HRU calendar changes or a stable post-time source is confirmed.
limitations: Stable reusable per-race post times were not confirmed.
The reviewed scope covers Maroñas and Las Piedras.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can maintain C-level meeting dates and venue pairings from the official HRU route.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Svensk Galopp calendar route changes or stable race times become available.
limitations: Reusable first-race and per-race times were not confirmed.
Surface coverage remains outside this backfill.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can maintain C-level Swedish race days and venues from the official calendar.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Dansk Galop route changes or national venue completeness is established.
limitations: National venue coverage remains incomplete.
Reusable first, last, and per-race post times were not confirmed.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can use the reviewed national guidance route for C-level meeting context.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Klampenborg calendar route changes or stable race times become available.
limitations: General event times must not be converted into scheduled race post times.
The decision is venue-specific.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can maintain C-level Klampenborg meeting dates from the official venue route.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the national calendar route changes or the active venue inventory is completed.
limitations: A stable national per-race timetable was not confirmed.
Complete active venue coverage remains under review.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can use the national official route for C-level dated meetings.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Chuchle Arena racing route changes or stable race times become available.
limitations: The decision is venue-specific.
No stable per-race timetable was confirmed.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can maintain C-level Chuchle meeting dates from the official venue route.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Hipodrom Most route changes or stable race times become available.
limitations: The decision is venue-specific.
No stable per-race timetable was confirmed.
records.notes: Manual confirmation can maintain C-level Most meeting dates from the official venue route.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Kincsem Park calendar or programme-file structure changes.
limitations: Reviewed scope is Kincsem Park and is not a complete national inventory.
Participant, betting, result, and complete racecard fields remain excluded.
records.notes: A bounded manual-import prototype can use official programme files while preserving the A public ceiling.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Malta Racing Club publishes a new calendar or changes the calendar route.
limitations: First-race, last-race, and per-race post times were not confirmed.
records.notes: Calendar-level manual confirmation is complete; no automated timetable claim is made.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Krieau programme routes change or wider Austrian racing coverage is reviewed.
limitations: Technical A applies only to the reviewed Krieau scope.
Country-wide Austrian racing coverage is incomplete.
records.notes: Prototype treatment is venue-specific and does not raise the country public ceiling above C.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Camarero changes programme publication routes or document structure.
limitations: Conditions, awards, participants, betting, results, and full racecard content remain excluded.
records.notes: A bounded programme importer can preserve race labels and post times only.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Caymanas calendar or race-card routes change.
limitations: Participant, betting, result, and full racecard fields must be ignored.
records.notes: A parser prototype may extract schedule fields only.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at fixture rollover and when programme document URLs or structure change.
limitations: Participant, purse, betting, result, and full racecard fields remain excluded.
Reviewed document URLs are date-specific and require rollover handling.
records.notes: Manual programme import is the conservative initial treatment.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Barbados Turf Club calendar or programme routes change.
limitations: Entries, participants, betting, results, payouts, and complete racebook content remain excluded.
records.notes: A bounded programme importer can publish schedule fields only.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Carrère publishes a stable current forward calendar or race-time route.
limitations: The venue calendar is not consistently current enough for reusable forward extraction.
First-race and per-race times remain unconfirmed.
records.notes: Manual C-level confirmation uses current official venue evidence without automation claims.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at annual fixture rollover or if BHA changes the fixture route.
limitations: A stable reusable national race-time route was not established.
records.notes: The national Calendar decision is complete at meeting-date and racecourse level.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Equibase entry routes change or wider racing-code coverage is reviewed.
limitations: Technical A applies only to the reviewed Thoroughbred subsystem.
Quarter Horse, Standardbred, state-regulated, and other racing contexts remain outside scope.
Participant and betting fields must be ignored.
records.notes: A bounded Equibase prototype must remain system-specific and cannot represent all United States racing.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Racing Australia racebook routes change or state/code coverage expands.
limitations: Technical A applies only to the reviewed Thoroughbred subsystem.
State principal authorities and other racing codes require separate review.
Complete racebook content must not be republished.
records.notes: Manual-import prototype remains bounded to Racing Australia Thoroughbred schedules.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at season rollover or when HRI fixture and meeting routes change.
limitations: Runner, participant, betting, result, and complete racecard fields remain excluded.
records.notes: A national HRI prototype can target reviewed fixture and meeting schedule fields.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when France Galop calendar or programme routes change.
limitations: Participant, betting, result, and complete programme content remain excluded.
records.notes: France Galop remains a separate flat and obstacle system.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when LETROT upcoming-race routes change.
limitations: Participant, betting, result, and complete programme content remain excluded.
records.notes: LETROT remains separate from France Galop in acquisition and attribution.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Ontario approved race-date routes change or deeper schedule evidence is reviewed.
limitations: This record is provincial, not countrywide.
The selected official evidence is calendar-level and does not prove reusable per-race times for every Ontario code.
records.notes: Ontario is completed as a provincial manual C-level decision.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Standardbred Canada racing routes change or wider provincial coverage is reviewed.
limitations: Technical A applies only to the reviewed Standardbred subsystem.
Canada's full provincial and multi-code source structure remains incomplete.
records.notes: Prototype treatment remains code-specific and cannot represent all Canadian racing.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate at JCSA season rollover or when meeting and race routes change.
limitations: Race conditions, purse, participants, betting, results, and complete programme fields remain excluded.
records.notes: A centralized JCSA prototype can target schedule fields only.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Bangalore Turf Club fixture routes change.
limitations: Technical A applies only to the reviewed Bangalore club system.
Complete Indian national club coverage remains unresolved.
records.notes: Club-specific prototype does not raise the India country ceiling above C.

records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when RWITC calendar routes change.
limitations: Technical A applies only to the reviewed RWITC club system.
Complete Indian national club coverage remains unresolved.
records.notes: Club-specific prototype does not raise the India country ceiling above C.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reassess when a stable RCTC fixture or programme route is recorded and reviewed.
limitations: The reviewed Profile references the official club home route rather than a stable timetable endpoint.
National completeness remains unresolved.
records.notes: Completed treatment is an official club link and explanatory C-level scope.

records.revalidation_trigger: Reassess when a stable Madras Race Club fixture or programme route is recorded and reviewed.
limitations: The reviewed Profile references the official club home route rather than a stable timetable endpoint.
National completeness remains unresolved.
records.notes: Completed treatment is an official club link and explanatory C-level scope.
